description: MCP (Model Context Protocol) server for MATLAB that enables AI-driven workflows (Deprecated, please use `main/codewhale` instead).
notes: This manifest is deprecated and scheduled for removal on 2026-09-01. Please use `main/matlab-mcp-server` instead.
As of v0.11.0, MATLAB MCP Core Server has been renamed to MATLAB MCP Server.
To use the latest version of the server after this change, you must update your settings.
To opt out of data collection, set the argument "--disable-telemetry" to true.
